plan_kts:
fun plan(specPath: String, implementationPlanPath: String): Verdict {
    val repoContextReadme = readFile(".repo_context/README.md")
    val repoContextIndex = readFile(".repo_context/index.md")
    val repoContextMaintenance = readFile(".repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedRepoIndex = readFile(".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val relevantContextPaths = selectRelevantContextPaths(generatedRepoIndex, specPath, implementationPlanPath)
    val relevantContext = readFiles(relevantContextPaths)
    val specText = readFile(specPath)
    val planText = readFile(implementationPlanPath)
    val specRequirements = extractSpecRequirements(specText)
    val planSteps = extractImplementationPlanSteps(planText)
    val evidenceMatrix = mapRequirementsToPlanSteps(specRequirements, planSteps, relevantContext, engineeringPrinciples)
    val gaps = findCoverageGaps(evidenceMatrix)
    val unsupportedClaims = findUnsupportedPlanClaims(planSteps, specRequirements)
    val verdict = buildPlanImplementsSpecVerdict(evidenceMatrix, gaps, unsupportedClaims)
    return makeResult(verdict)
}
